\newcommand{\dF}[1]{\mathbb{F}_#1}
% from macros.tex:336
\newcommand{\dI}{\mathbf{I}}
% from macros.tex:337
\newcommand{\dN}{\mathbb{N}}
% from macros.tex:338
\newcommand{\dP}{\mathbb{P}}
% from macros.tex:339
\newcommand{\dQ}{\mathbb{Q}}
% from macros.tex:340
\newcommand{\dR}{\mathbb{R}}
% from macros.tex:341
\newcommand{\dS}{\mathbb{S}}
% from macros.tex:342
\newcommand{\dZ}[1][]{\ifblank{#1}{\mathbb{Z}}{\mathbb{Z}/#1\mathbb{Z}}}
% from macros.tex:349
\providecommand{\mycomment}[3]{\todo[caption={},size=footnotesize,color=#1!20]{\textbf{#2: }#3}}
% from macros.tex:350
\providecommand{\inlinecomment}[3]{%
  {\color{#1}#2: #3}}
% from macros.tex:352
\newcommand
% from macros.tex:380
\def\UrlBreaks{\do\/\do-}
% from assembler.tex:69
\newcommand{\vDelta}{\mathbf{\Delta}}
% from assembler.tex:70
\def\hR{\widehat{\mathcal{R}}}
% [intra-paper duplicate] \vec — also defined at macros.tex:17
% from assembler.tex:72
\renewcommand{\vec}[1]{\bm{#1}}
% from assembler.tex:73
\newcommand
